Chronology of every recorded fact about [[The Grave]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 32''' — The Grave is a floating artificial mountain in space made of metal and stone.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 32''' — The Grave was cobbled together from outdated pieces to protect an outpost of early Abidan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 37''' — The Grave is a location that makes perception difficult due to the nature of the place.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 37''' — The Grave is large enough to potentially hold several cities.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 37''' — The Grave is a hovering station with a rough and uneven external surface.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 39''' — The Grave consists of gray hallways.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 6''' — The Grave is a mass of steel and stone hanging in orbit above the central world of Sanctum.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 7''' — The Grave contains a briefing-room that resembles a cloudship's bridge.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 7''' — The Grave contains a briefing room with wide, sweeping monitors.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 12''' — The Grave is a station named by Ozriel.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
